intent_summary: Build Field Monitor Snap-On Tool Phase 5 Full Integration Test. Go/No-Go gate for entire Field Monitor build. Seed url_registry with 3 test URLs covering: (1) known stable field value — expect gate_reached:4, delta_flag:0, (2) field value changed since last check — expect gate_reached:5, confirmation_pending set, (3) second pass with confirmed delta — expect gate_reached:7, signal emitted. Trigger Scheduler in live mode (dry_run=false). Verify full pipeline: Scheduler → Orchestrator → spokes → Neon. Verify all check_log and field_state rows correct. Verify no unexpected error_log entries. CTB trigger must not fire on valid runs. Auditor produces integration test report: PASS/FAIL per scenario, overall PASS/FAIL. Overall FAIL on any single scenario failure. Post-build: ADR for SNAP_ON_TOOLBOX.yaml registration, register TOOL-FM-001 through TOOL-FM-005, document V1 scale limitations.
phase_label: Full Integration Test — End-to-End Pipeline Verification
go_condition: All 3 scenarios correct. Scenario 1: delta_flag=0, gate_reached=4. Scenario 2: confirmation_pending=true, recheck_due_at set, gate_reached=5. Scenario 3: gate_reached=7, delta_flag=1, confirmed_flag=true, signal_code assigned, emission_confirmation present. CTB trigger never fires on valid runs. error_log empty or expected entries only.

final_gate.pass: Field Monitor build-complete. Ready for ADR + SNAP_ON_TOOLBOX.yaml registration.
final_gate.fail: Return to failing phase. Diagnose via error_log + Worker logs. Re-run from that phase forward.

agent_routing.db_agent: Seed url_registry with 3 test records per scenario specs. Verify seed before triggering Scheduler.
agent_routing.builder: No code changes expected. If integration test reveals bug, patch failing gate only — no scope expansion.
agent_routing.auditor: Pull check_log, field_state, error_log for all 3 test sovereign_ids. Verify per Go conditions. Produce integration test report.

post_build_requirements: ADR for Field Monitor addition to SNAP_ON_TOOLBOX.yaml
Document V1 scale limitations in ADR
constraints: Do not expand scope beyond integration test + bug fixes
Any patch must be scoped to failing gate only
Do not proceed to SNAP_ON_TOOLBOX.yaml registration without Auditor PASS
Integration test report is a required artifact
